title: Configurable AI Autonomy Levels
description: Replace binary ai_mode + auto_mode toggles with a single ai_autonomy_level setting: off/manual/semi_auto/fully_auto

stories.title: AiAgent service: getAutonomyLevel(), shouldAutoApply(), updated isEnabled/isAutoMode
acceptanceCriteria: getAutonomyLevel() reads 'ai_autonomy_level' from settingsRepo, defaults to 'off' if not set
isEnabled() returns true when autonomy level is NOT 'off'
isAutoMode() returns true ONLY when level is 'fully_auto'
shouldAutoApply(type) returns true for all types when fully_auto
shouldAutoApply(type) returns true only for ad_copy/creative when semi_auto
shouldAutoApply(type) returns false for all types when manual or off
analyzeAndSuggest uses shouldAutoApply(s.type) per-suggestion instead of global autoMode flag
Unit tests for all getAutonomyLevel, shouldAutoApply, semi_auto behavior

stories.title: API: POST /autonomy endpoint + updated GET /status + backward-compat /toggle
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/ai-agent/autonomy { level } validates level is one of off/manual/semi_auto/fully_auto
POST /api/ai-agent/autonomy sets ai_autonomy_level in settingsRepo and returns updated status
POST /api/ai-agent/autonomy returns 400 for invalid level values
Existing POST /toggle endpoint maps ai_mode/auto_mode booleans to ai_autonomy_level

stories.title: UI: Replace dual toggle with autonomy level selector in settings
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page AI Mode card shows radio group with 4 options: Off / Manual Approval / Semi-Auto / Fully Automatic
Current autonomy_level is pre-selected from state.aiMode.autonomy_level
Changing selection calls POST /ai-agent/autonomy and re-renders
Each option has a clear description label
